data.headline: Final Push: Consolidate Lead with Haaland Captaincy and Key Transfers.
team: Captain Haaland (40 form, 7.3 expected points) for a strong final Gameweek.
Consider transferring Tavernier or Welbeck to Watkins (40 form) to boost your attack.
